description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Book a plumbing provider near a given ZIP code who is within 5 miles, has at least 4 stars, charges under $120/hour, and has an available appointment tomorrow evening between 6–8 PM.

target_names: prov_plumb_budget_flow evening slot on tomorrow’s date

tasks.instruction: Create a handyman booking by selecting exactly three small tasks whose combined estimate is under $200 and schedule them for the next available Saturday morning between 9 AM and 12 PM.

tasks.instruction: Search for electricians up to $90/hour in a given ZIP code, compare the first two results, and add to favorites the one with the same or lower hourly rate and more 5-star reviews, breaking ties by the first result.

tasks.instruction: Sign up for a new account, then in notification settings enable email updates, disable SMS updates, and set your preferred service area to the Downtown neighborhood.

tasks.instruction: Save a new-customer coupon that gives at least 15% off plumbing services to your account, then start a leaking-sink plumbing booking and apply the coupon so the total shown is under $100.

tasks.instruction: Use the interior painting quote form to request an estimate for a 150 sq ft living room with a $300 budget and three preferred time slots on three different days next week.

tasks.instruction: From your upcoming handyman bookings, take your next scheduled appointment and reschedule it with the same provider to a date at least 3 days later in the afternoon (after 1:00 PM).

tasks.instruction: From the help center, send a support message about a billing or payment question by choosing a completed repair booking, selecting the billing topic, briefly describing the issue, and requesting email as the contact method.
